title: campanula neglecta
intro: Campanula neglecta, also known as Dwarf Bellflower, is a perennial plant species native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and roots have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, offering benefits like reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing coughs. Herbal preparations of Campanula neglecta can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine practices.
